case_title: **TRANSFERRED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY ** BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION VS. ANN RANKIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ANN RANKIN INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA THE LAW OFFICES OF ANN RANKIN'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 62044443) FILED BY DEFENDANT RANKIN, ANN INDIVIDUALLY AND D/B/A THE LAW OFFICES OF ANN RANKIN HEARING SET FOR JUN-21-2018 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ANN RANKIN'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE IS GRANTED. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO ALAMEDA SUPERIOR COURT. PLAINTIFF BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION DOES NOT OPPOSE THE MOTION. PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PAY ALL COSTS OF TRANSFER BECAUSE THE MOTION WAS BASED ON THE GROUNDS THAT SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT A PROPER VENUE FOR THIS CASE. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2018 Off Calendar

Ann Rankin Individually And Dba The Law Offices Of Ann Rankin'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Venue
Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ANN RANKIN's And Dba The Law Offices Of Ann Rankin'S Motion To Change Venue.

Defendant Ann Rankin's motion to change venue is granted. The case is transferred to Alameda Superior Court. Plaintiff Beacon Residential Community Association does not oppose the motion. Plaintiff is required to pay all costs of transfer because the motion was based on the grounds that San Francisco is not a proper venue for this case.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
